case_title: AGUIRRE, SALVADOR C. VS WELL'S FARGO BANK (ATTN C. ANDERSON)

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY AGUIRRE, SALVADOR C. AS TO DEFENDANT WELL'S FARGO BANK (ATTN C. ANDERSON) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-02-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-02-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-19-2002 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 PER PARTIES' REQUEST. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF PROCESS.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT WELL'S FARGO BANK (ATTN C. ANDERSON) SETTLED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
